title: STITCH-1234: Implement password reset email flow
body:
## Summary

Implements the password reset flow as described in STITCH-1234.

### Changes
- Added `/api/v1/auth/reset-password` endpoint
- JWT token generation using RS256
- Email template for password reset
- Rate limiting: 3 requests/email/hour via Redis sliding window
- Password history check (last 5 passwords)

### Testing
- Unit tests for token generation and validation
- Integration tests for the full reset flow
- Load test for rate limiter

### Related
- STITCH-1234
- Design doc: https://docs.stitchai.com/auth/password-reset

title: STITCH-1234: Add rate limiting to password reset endpoint
body:
## Summary

Follow-up to #142. Adds proper rate limiting as discussed in STITCH-1234 comments.

### Changes
- Redis sliding window rate limiter for reset requests
- Max 3 attempts per email per hour
- Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration
- Added monitoring metrics for rate-limited requests

### Testing
- Unit tests for rate limiter logic
- Integration test verifying 4th request is blocked

title: STITCH-1234: Fix password history migration
body:
## Summary

Fixes a migration issue found during testing of STITCH-1234.

The `password_history` table migration was missing a NOT NULL constraint on `user_id` and lacked an index on `(user_id, created_at)` which is needed for the "last 5 passwords" query.

### Changes
- Fixed migration 20260403_create_password_history.sql
- Added composite index
- Added down migration
